evals.prompt: I just cloned this repo and I have no idea how it's structured. Can you analyze the architecture and tell me what I'm looking at? The repo is at ./my-project.
evals.expected_output: Runs the architecture analyzer on the repository, reads the generated report, and returns a concise summary of the repo shape, design patterns, entry points, and recommended next steps or linked skills.

evals.prompt: We're about to refactor the authentication flow in this codebase. Can you analyze how the login subsystem is architected before we start? The repo is at ./backend-service.
evals.expected_output: Runs the analyzer with --focus on the authentication/login subsystem, reads the focused report, and returns an architecture snapshot centered on auth, including boundaries, design patterns, and recommended follow-up skills such as feature-call-chain-mapper.

evals.prompt: This monorepo is huge and I only care about the web app in apps/web. Can you analyze just that part and skip the generated vendor code? The repo is at ./huge-monorepo.
evals.expected_output: Runs the analyzer with --include apps/web and --exclude vendor/generated, reads the scoped report, and returns a focused architecture summary of the web app without noise from unrelated packages.
